final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical instructional infographic showing step-by-step deployment of Hermes in Docker container with GLMCodingPlan integration, labeled clearly as steps 1-2-3-4.

Style/medium: clean technical documentation infographic, instructional diagram style with clear visual hierarchy
Composition: vertical 4-step flow layout, each step as a distinct numbered panel with icon, command block, and brief explanation, left-to-right or top-to-bottom progression
Subject: 
  Step 1 — Docker environment setup and prerequisites
  Step 2 — Pulling Hermes image and container initialization
  Step 3 — Configuring Hermes with GLMCodingPlan integration
  Step 4 — Verification and connection testing
Scene/backdrop: terminal/command-line interface context, Docker container visualization, server environment schematic
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: neutral documentation colors with accent for step numbers and code blocks, high contrast for readability
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4" as clear step labels; actual shell commands and configuration snippets for each step; "Hermes", "Docker", "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: each step must be visually distinct with clear numbering, command code blocks must be legible, logical flow from setup to verification, all 4 steps clearly labeled
Avoid: decorative flourishes, ambiguous step ordering, illegible small text, missing step numbers, cluttered overlapping elements
